scripts.agent:auto:continuous:test: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/agent-workforce/run-continuous-controlled-loop.ps1 -Goal "Phase 236A continuous loop smoke test" -MaxRounds 2 -TimeoutSeconds 10 -PollSeconds 1 -SleepSecondsBetweenRounds 0 -UseSampleResult 1 -CopyFeedbackToClipboard 0
scripts.verify:phase7a: pnpm verify:phase7a-1 && pnpm verify:phase7a-2 && pnpm -r --if-present check
scripts.verify:phase21: pnpm verify:phase21a && pnpm verify:phase21b && pnpm verify:phase21c
scripts.verify:enterprise: pnpm verify:phase32a && pnpm verify:phase33a && pnpm verify:phase34a && pnpm verify:phase35a && pnpm verify:phase36a && pnpm verify:phase37a && pnpm verify:phase38a && pnpm verify:phase40a && pnpm verify:phase41a && pnpm verify:phase42a && pnpm verify:phase43a && pnpm verify:phase44a && pnpm verify:phase45a && pnpm verify:phase46a && pnpm verify:phase47a && pnpm verify:phase48a

scripts.check: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); for (const f of ['src/contracts/common.ts','src/contracts/gateway.ts','src/contracts/provider.ts','src/contracts/routing.ts','src/contracts/governance.ts','src/contracts/knowledge.ts','src/contracts/modelImport.ts','src/contracts/setup.ts','src/contracts/workflow.ts','src/contracts/workforce.ts','src/contracts/index.ts','src/index.ts']) fs.accessSync(f); console.log('shared-contracts: contracts ready')"
